clusters.title: Minimum rental standards
clusters.neutral_headline: Minimum rental standards

items.title: Minimum rental standards
items.standfirst: Think your rental falls below the minimum standards? In a rental crisis, people are taking what they can get and it doesn't always match the listed description. The rules may vary across Australia but renters can take the issue to a tribunal such as NCAT or VCAT. It's where you'd go to force repairs, seek compensation or even push for a lower rent.
items.content: Think your rental falls below the minimum standards? In a rental crisis, people are taking what they can get and it doesn't always match the listed description. The rules may vary across Australia but renters can take the issue to a tribunal such as NCAT or VCAT. It's where you'd go to force repairs, seek compensation or even push for a lower rent.
